# 509dds-data

> Open data, source documents, and analysis for SEIU Local 509's Disability
> Determination Services (DDS) chapter in Massachusetts. DDS = Disability
> Determination Services (adjudicates SSI/SSDI claims), NOT the Department of
> Developmental Services. Audience: union stewards, bargaining-team negotiators,
> 509dds.com developers, and researchers.

Every dataset has a `<file>.meta.json` data card (schema: `schemas/dataset.meta.schema.json`).
The full machine index is `catalog.json`. Confidence tiers: Authoritative,
Computed, Browser-fetch pending, PRR-pending, Structurally unavailable.
This file and catalog.json are generated by `scripts/build_catalog.py`.


_280 datasets indexed._


## SSA datasets (data/ssa)

- [SSA Document Fetch Report (2026-05-05) — Provenance Log](data/ssa/FETCH_REPORT.md): Provenance/run log documenting the 2026-05-05 fetch of SSA documents (Annual Performance Reports, Congressional Justifications, and the extracted DDS budget se… Computed.
- [DDS Initial & Reconsideration Allowance Rates by State, FY2018–FY2024](data/ssa/allowance-rates/allowance-rates-by-state-2018-2024.json): Long-format (tidy) table of SSA disability allowance rates by geographic scope (national, SSA region, and state) and federal fiscal year, FY2018–FY2024. Authoritative.
- [DDS Initial & Reconsideration Allowance Rates by State, FY2019 (SSA FOIA Reading Room)](data/ssa/allowance-rates/fy2019-foia-reading-room.json): Long-format (tidy) table of SSA disability allowance rates by geographic scope (national, SSA region, and state) for federal fiscal year 2019 only, sourced fro… Authoritative.
- [SSA FY2025 Congressional Justification — Extracted Text (DDS budget & work-years)](data/ssa/budget/cj-fy25-extracted.md): Markdown text extracted from SSA's FY2025 Congressional Justification of Estimates for Appropriations Committees (FY25-JEAC.pdf): budget authority, LAE, progra… Computed.
- [SSA FY2025 Budget — DDS Section (Extracted)](data/ssa/budget/dds-section-fy25.md): The DDS-specific section extracted from SSA's FY2025 Congressional Justification: budget-authority and work-year tables (FY2023 enacted / FY2024 estimate / FY2… Computed.
- [SSA Combined Disability Processing Time, Monthly, FY2008–FY2015](data/ssa/cdp-time-monthly-fy08-fy15.csv): Historical national average combined disability processing (elapsed) time in days, reported monthly, FY2008 through FY2015. Authoritative.
- [SSA Combined Disability Processing Time, Monthly, FY2016–FY2026](data/ssa/cdp-time-monthly-fy16-fy26.csv): National average combined disability processing (elapsed) time in days, reported monthly, from FY2016 through the latest available month of FY2026. Authoritative.
- [National Initial Disability Claims by Title, FY2001–FY2018](data/ssa/claims/initial-claims-by-title-fy2001-2019.json): Long-format (tidy) national time series of initial disability claim counts by program title — SSDI (Title II), SSI (Title XVI), concurrent, and total — by fede… Authoritative.
- [DDS COVID Telework Start Evidence (March 2020)](data/ssa/covid-telework/dds-covid-telework-start-evidence.md): Computed evidence packet tracing when Massachusetts DDS likely began work-from-home/telework during the COVID-19 pandemic. Computed.
- [DDS Net Accuracy Rate by State, FY2007–FY2022](data/ssa/dds-net-accuracy-by-state-2007-2022.csv): SSA federal quality-assurance net accuracy rate for state Disability Determination Services (DDS), by state and fiscal year, 2007–2022, with sampling variabili… Authoritative.
- [DDS Net Accuracy Rate by State, FY2007–FY2022 (latest-vintage alias)](data/ssa/dds-net-accuracy-by-state-2007-LATEST.csv): Latest-vintage pointer to the SSA federal quality-assurance net accuracy rate for state Disability Determination Services (DDS), by state and federal fiscal ye… Authoritative.
- [OHO NetStat Report (01) — Raw Rendered-HTML Capture (FY2025 YTD)](data/ssa/oho/01-netstat-report.tables.json): Raw rendered-HTML capture of SSA OHO's '01_NetStat_Report' (Average Wait Time Until Hearing Held) page, fetched 2026-05-05 via Playwright. Computed.
- [OHO ALJ Disposition Data (03) — Raw Rendered-HTML Capture (FY2025 YTD)](data/ssa/oho/03-alj-disposition.tables.json): Raw rendered-HTML capture of SSA OHO's '03_ALJ_Disposition_Data' page, fetched 2026-05-05 via Playwright. Computed.
- [OHO Datasets Availability Summary (Reference)](data/ssa/oho/AVAILABILITY_SUMMARY.txt): Reference matrix (as of 2026-05-05) of the SSA OHO public data files: the five primary reports (ALJ disposition, hearing-office workload, average wait time, di… Authoritative.
- [OHO Data Fields Reference (Field Definitions)](data/ssa/oho/FIELD_DEFINITIONS.txt): Field-by-field reference for the SSA OHO public datasets, based on the SSA Data Dictionary. Authoritative.
- [OHO ALJ Disposition Data by Judge, FY2025 YTD (latest-vintage)](data/ssa/oho/alj-disposition-by-judge-LATEST.csv): Per-Administrative-Law-Judge hearing-stage disposition data for FY2025 YTD: 1,439 individual ALJs with their owning hearing office, total dispositions, disposi… Authoritative.
- [OHO Hearing Office → State Mapping (Curated)](data/ssa/oho/hearing-office-to-state.csv): Curated lookup mapping each SSA OHO hearing office name to its physical-site state code, used to aggregate ALJ-stage dispositions to the state level. Computed.
- [OHO Hearing Office Average Wait Time (Months), FY2025 YTD (latest-vintage)](data/ssa/oho/hearing-office-wait-time-LATEST.csv): Average wait time (in months) from request-for-hearing to hearing held, by SSA OHO hearing office, for the current period (FY2025 YTD). Authoritative.
- [Per-State ALJ Allowance Rate at the Hearing Stage, FY2025 YTD (Computed)](data/ssa/oho/per-state-alj-allowance-LATEST.json): Computed per-state aggregation of ALJ hearing-stage outcomes for FY2025 YTD: for each of 49 states, the ALJ count, total dispositions, decisions, awards, denia… Computed.
- [SSA OIG Audit 072309 — Staffing, Productivity, and Processing Times at State DDS (FY2019–FY2023)](data/ssa/oig-audit-staffing-productivity-072309.md): Full text (markdown) of SSA Office of the Inspector General audit report 072309, 'Staffing, Productivity, and Processing Times at State Disability Determinatio… Authoritative.
- [Peer-State Disability Determination Time Series, 2010–2024](data/ssa/peer-states-timeseries-2010-2024.json): Per-year disability determination volumes and favorable-decision rates for Massachusetts and eight population-peer states (AZ, IN, MD, MO, TN, VA, WA, WI), 201… Computed.
- [SSA FY2024 Annual Performance Report — Extracted Text (with DDS performance)](data/ssa/performance/apr-fy24-extracted.md): Markdown text extracted from SSA's FY2024 Annual Performance Report (SSA_FY24_APR.pdf): strategic goals/objectives, performance measures, and disability-determ… Computed.
- [SSA FY2025 Performance Results Overview — Extracted Text](data/ssa/performance/apr-fy25-extracted.md): Markdown text extracted from SSA's 'Overview of Our Fiscal Year 2025 Performance Results' (the Agency Financial Report's management discussion of FY2025 result… Computed.
- [SSA Periodic CDR Case Backlog, FY2014–FY2018](data/ssa/periodic-cdr-backlog-fy14-fy18.csv): National year-end backlog of periodic Continuing Disability Reviews (CDRs) by program, fiscal years 2014–2018. Authoritative.
- [SSA Periodic Continuing Disability Reviews Processed, FY2013–FY2022](data/ssa/periodic-cdr-fy13-fy22.csv): National counts of periodic CDRs processed each fiscal year, broken down by a hierarchical program-involvement taxonomy (Title II, Title XVI, concurrent; disab… Authoritative.
- [SSA State-Agency Fiscal-Year Workload (SSA-SA-FYWL), All States, FY2001–FY2024](data/ssa/ssa-sa-fywl-all-states-2001-2024.csv): SSA State Agency fiscal-year workload file (SSA-SA-FYWL): per-state, per-federal-fiscal-year adult and SSI-child disability program statistics — population den… Authoritative.
- [SSA State-Agency Fiscal-Year Workload (SSA-SA-FYWL), All States, FY2001–FY2024 (latest-vintage alias)](data/ssa/ssa-sa-fywl-all-states-2001-LATEST.csv): Latest-vintage pointer to the SSA State Agency fiscal-year workload file (SSA-SA-FYWL): per-state, per-federal-fiscal-year adult and SSI-child disability stati… Authoritative.
- [Total DDS Employees by State, FY2010–FY2023](data/ssa/staffing/dds-employees-by-state-fy2010-2023.json): Long-format (tidy) table of total Disability Determination Services (DDS) employee counts by geographic scope (national, SSA region, and state) and federal fis… Authoritative.
- [DDS Disability Examiners by State, FY2002–FY2018](data/ssa/staffing/dds-examiners-by-state-fy2002-2018.json): Long-format (tidy) table of Disability Determination Services (DDS) disability-examiner counts by geographic scope (national, SSA region, and state) and federa… Authoritative.

- [Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission (MRC) Annual Report FY2023](data/ma-annual-reports/mrc-fy23.md): Official annual report of the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission (MRC) for state fiscal year 2023 (July 1, 2022 – June 30, 2023), the last annual report p… Authoritative.
- [MRC Statewide Rehabilitation Council (SRC) Annual Report FY2022](data/ma-annual-reports/src-fy22.md): Annual report of the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission Statewide Rehabilitation Council (SRC) for fiscal year 2022 (July 1, 2021 – June 30, 2022). Authoritative.
- [MRC Statewide Rehabilitation Council (SRC) Annual Report FY2023](data/ma-annual-reports/src-fy23.md): Annual report of the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission Statewide Rehabilitation Council (SRC) for fiscal year 2023 (July 1, 2022 – June 30, 2023). Authoritative.
- [SRC FY2024 (UNAVAILABLE — file is a mislabeled duplicate of the MassAbility FY24 report)](data/ma-annual-reports/src-fy24.md): The genuine State Rehabilitation Council FY2024 annual report is NOT present in this file. Structurally unavailable.

## Reasonable-accommodation process (data/ra-process)

- [Massachusetts Executive Branch ADA Coordinator Listing (March 10, 2026)](data/ra-process/ada-coordinator-listing-2026-03-10.csv): Official listing of Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) coordinators for Massachusetts Executive Branch agencies, published by the Massachusetts Office on Di… Authoritative.
- [MassAbility DDS — HR & Reasonable-Accommodation Contacts (Compiled)](data/ra-process/contacts.md): Compiled contact directory for MassAbility DDS employees navigating a reasonable-accommodation (RA) request, MassHR issue, or HR escalation. Computed.
- [Disability Rights in Employment — Massachusetts Office on Disability (mass.gov capture)](data/ra-process/disability-rights-in-employment.md): Capture of the Massachusetts Office on Disability (MOD) reference page on disability rights in the workplace. Authoritative.
- [Disability Law Center Self-Advocacy Guide (October 2023)](data/ra-process/dlc-self-advocacy-guide-oct-2023.pdf): Self-advocacy guide published by the Disability Law Center (DLC), Massachusetts's federally designated Protection & Advocacy organization, dated October 2023. Authoritative.
- [MassAbility Disability Determination Services (DDS) — mass.gov capture](data/ra-process/massability-dds-info.md): Capture of the official mass.gov page for MassAbility Disability Determination Services (DDS). Authoritative.
- [Reasonable Accommodations for Executive Department Employees — mass.gov capture](data/ra-process/ra-application-page.md): Capture of the Massachusetts Human Resources Division (HRD) landing page for reasonable-accommodation (RA) requests by Executive Branch employees. Authoritative.
- [Reasonable Accommodation Process for State Executive Branch Employees — mass.gov capture](data/ra-process/ra-process-state-exec-branch.md): Capture of the Massachusetts Office on Disability (MOD) guidance page detailing the full reasonable-accommodation (RA) process for Executive Branch state emplo… Authoritative.
- [SEIU Local 509 Units 8 and 10 — mass.gov capture](data/ra-process/seiu-509-units-8-10.md): Capture of the Massachusetts Human Resources Division (HRD) page for SEIU Local 509 Units 8 and 10, the bargaining units covering Commonwealth human-service wo… Authoritative.

## Labor rights & enforcement (data/labor-rights)

- [Steward Cheat Sheet — Massachusetts Labor Rights & Filing Quick Reference](data/labor-rights/00-CHEATSHEET.md): Synthesized quick-reference for SEIU Local 509 stewards covering MA public-sector employees (DDS focus): an issue-to-agency decision tree across 12 enforcement… Computed.
- [Labor Rights Reference Index — Topic-Organized Navigation for 509dds Stewards](data/labor-rights/00-INDEX.md): Topic-organized navigation index mapping steward/member use-cases to specific source files in the labor-rights folder. Computed.
- [Know Your Rights — A Member's Guide to MA Labor Rights and Workplace Claims](data/labor-rights/00-MEMBER-GUIDE.md): Plain-language member-facing guide organized by workplace scenario (investigation/discipline, discrimination, wages, safety, injury, leave, unilateral change,… Computed.
- [Massachusetts Labor Rights Reference — Statute Index for 509dds Stewards](data/labor-rights/00-ma-labor-law-reference.md): Statute and doctrine index compiled for SEIU Local 509 DDS chapter steward/grievance use. Computed.
- [Massachusetts Department of Labor Relations (DLR) — Agency Landing Page](data/labor-rights/01-ma-dlr.md): Scrape of the MA Department of Labor Relations landing page. Authoritative.
- [Massachusetts Commission Against Discrimination (MCAD) — Agency Landing Page (multi-subpage bundle)](data/labor-rights/02-ma-mcad.md): Scrape of the MCAD landing page. Authoritative.
- [Massachusetts Attorney General's Fair Labor Division (FLD) — Agency Landing Page](data/labor-rights/03-ma-ago-fairlabor.md): Scrape of the MA Attorney General's Fair Labor Division landing page. Authoritative.

- [Massachusetts State Ethics Commission — Agency Landing Page](data/labor-rights/07-ma-ethics.md): Scrape of the MA State Ethics Commission landing page. Authoritative.
- [EEOC — Filing a Charge of Discrimination](data/labor-rights/08-eeoc.md): Scrape of the EEOC charge-filing guidance page covering discrimination based on race, color, religion, sex (incl. Authoritative.
- [U.S. DOL Wage and Hour Division (WHD) — Agency Landing Page](data/labor-rights/09-dol-whd.md): Scrape of the U.S. Authoritative.
- [Federal OSHA — File a Complaint (Safety, Health & Whistleblower)](data/labor-rights/10-osha.md): Scrape of OSHA's complaint-filing hub covering two pathways: (1) Safety and Health complaints for unsafe conditions, filed confidentially online/phone/fax/mail… Authoritative.
- [National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) — Agency Landing Page](data/labor-rights/11-nlrb.md): Scrape of the NLRB landing page. Authoritative.
- [Labor Rights Agencies — Structured Extract of Contacts, Jurisdictions, Statutes, and Filing Deadlines](data/labor-rights/agencies.json): Machine-readable JSON extract of 12 enforcement agencies relevant to SEIU Local 509 DDS members (MA DLR, MCAD, AGO Fair Labor, DLS, DIA, CSC, State Ethics, EEO… Computed.
- [DLR: Prohibited Practices — Case-Law Summary (M.G.L. c.150E)](data/labor-rights/sub-01-dlr-prohibited-practices.md): Chapter of the Massachusetts Public Employee Collective Bargaining Law Guide (DLR) covering the case-law treatment of prohibited practices under M.G.L. Authoritative.
- [DLR: Unfair Labor Practice (Prohibited Practice) Procedures](data/labor-rights/sub-01-dlr-ulp-procedures.md): Chapter of the Massachusetts Public Employee Collective Bargaining Law Guide (DLR) explaining the procedural path for filing and litigating prohibited-practice… Authoritative.

- [AGO Fair Labor Division: File a Workplace Complaint](data/labor-rights/sub-03-ago-file-workplace-complaint.md): MA Attorney General's Office page on filing a workplace complaint with the Fair Labor Division — minimum wage, unpaid wages, overtime, independent-contractor m… Authoritative.

- [Paid Family and Medical Leave (PFML) Overview and Benefits — Massachusetts DFML](data/labor-rights/sub-dfml-pfml-overview.md): Comprehensive DFML overview of Massachusetts PFML under G.L. Authoritative.
- [Massachusetts Law About Sick Leave — Trial Court Law Libraries](data/labor-rights/sub-ma-sick-leave-overview.md): MA Trial Court Law Libraries research guide surveying the legal landscape of sick leave in Massachusetts: the earned sick time statute (G.L. Authoritative.
